Returns the format of the frame as FrameCaptureFormat

Retrieves the corresponding Lenght1 PropertyID number associated.

getMappedIntents() - 类 中的方法com.android.device.input.KeyboardManager
Provides a Map< com.datalogic.device.input.VScanEntry, android.content.Intent > containing all the stored and active Android Intent mappings.
getMappedKeyCodes() - 类 中的方法com.android.device.input.KeyboardManager
Provides a Map< com.datalogic.device.input.VScanEntry, com.datalogic.device.input.KeyCodeEntry> containing all the stored and active Android key codes mappings.

Returns the properties contained by this group.

GoodRead - com.android.decode.configuration中的类
GoodRead is the class that configures which type of notification is activated on a successful read.
GoodRead(PropertyGetter) - 类 的构造器com.android.decode.configuration.GoodRead
This is the constructor of GoodRead.
goodread - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.ScannerProperties
Provides configuration for good read notifications.
goodReadAudioMode - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.DecodingNotification
 
goodReadVibrateEnable - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.GoodRead
goodReadVibrateEnable requires the use of the vibrator notification on a successful read.
GREEN_SPOT_ENABLE - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
greenSpotEnable - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.GoodRead
greenSpotEnable requires the use of the green spot notification on a successful read.
gs1_128 - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.Code128
gs1_128 enables or disables the GS1-128 symbology.
GS1_14_ENABLE - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID

GS1_EXP_USER_ID - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
GS1_LIMIT_ENABLE - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
GS1_LIMIT_GS1_128_MODE - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
GS1_LIMIT_USER_ID - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
Gs1DataBar_14 - com.android.decode.configuration中的类
Gs1DataBar_14 is the class that configures the GS1 DataBar-14 Symbology.
Gs1DataBar_14(PropertyGetter) - 类 的构造器com.android.decode.configuration.Gs1DataBar_14
This is the constructor of Gs1DataBar_14.
gs1DataBar_14 - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.ScannerProperties
Controls the GS1 DataBar 14 barcode reading capabilities.
Gs1DataBar_Expanded - com.android.decode.configuration中的类
Gs1DataBar_Expanded is the class that configures the GS1 DataBar Expanded Symbology.
Gs1DataBar_Expanded(PropertyGetter) - 类 的构造器com.android.decode.configuration.Gs1DataBar_Expanded
This is the constructor of Gs1DataBar_Expanded.
gs1DataBar_Expanded - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.ScannerProperties
Controls the GS1 DataBar Expanded barcode reading capabilities.
Gs1DataBar_Limited - com.android.decode.configuration中的类
Gs1DataBar_Limited is the class that configures the GS1 DataBar Limited Symbology.
Gs1DataBar_Limited(PropertyGetter) - 类 的构造器com.android.decode.configuration.Gs1DataBar_Limited
This is the constructor of Gs1DataBar_Limited.
gs1DataBar_Limited - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.ScannerProperties
Controls the GS1 DataBar Limited barcode reading capabilities.
GS_SUBSTITUTION - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
